# `freebox_lan_interface_hosts` (Data Source)

Get information about the hosts of a LAN interface.

## Example

```terraform
data "freebox_lan_interface_hosts" "example" {
  interface = "..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `interface` (String) Name of the interface

### Read-Only

- `hosts` (Set of Object) List of hosts (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hosts))

<a id="nestedatt--hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `hosts`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)
